import subprocess
result = subprocess.run(
    ['python', '/a0/usr/skills/jira/scripts/jira.py', '--filter-id', '13811', '--view-id', '10489904'],
    capture_output=True,
    text=True
)
print('STDOUT:')
print(result.stdout)
print('\nSTDERR:')
print(result.stderr)
print('\nReturn code:', result.returncode)
